hard_road_feet.name: Hard Road Feet
hard_road_feet.desc: The road is a teacher, and you paid attention.
hard_road_feet.effect: Reduces road fatigue by 1 per day of travel.

false_seal_hand.name: False Seal Hand
false_seal_hand.desc: You practiced on warrants no one was reading.

cold_reader.name: Cold Reader
cold_reader.desc: People show their fears before they speak them.
cold_reader.effect: +1 to presence checks involving interrogation or persuasion.

mercy_with_teeth.name: Mercy With Teeth
mercy_with_teeth.desc: Kindness that the guilty remember longer than a wound.
mercy_with_teeth.effect: +1 morale on mercy or infirmary choices. Synod/Hearth presence bonus.

camp_surgeon.name: Camp Surgeon
camp_surgeon.desc: A needle and a prayer: sometimes it works.
camp_surgeon.effect: Rest recovers 1 medicine value and reduces wounds by 1.

door_sense.name: Door Sense
door_sense.desc: Every door has a second name.
door_sense.effect: +1 to escape and stealth route checks. Reduces alert when using escape routes.

red_debt_smile.name: Red Debt Smile
red_debt_smile.desc: You know what a signature is worth when the ink is red.
red_debt_smile.effect: +1 to blackmail, debt, and Red Ledger route checks.

ash_nerve.name: Ash-Nerve
ash_nerve.desc: The dead don't frighten you. The living do.
ash_nerve.effect: +1 resolve on occult or Cinder Veil checks. Minor high-alert resistance.

quartermaster_eye.name: Quartermaster Eye
quartermaster_eye.desc: Numbers don't lie. But they do forget who counted them.
quartermaster_eye.effect: +1 to supply route, quartermaster, and trade checks.

campfire_authority.name: Campfire Authority
campfire_authority.desc: People listen when you speak near fire.
campfire_authority.effect: +1 presence on camp and morale scenes. Companion loyalty rises faster.
